channel.title: Mammalia
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Mammalia

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Demographic characteristics of the endangered Barbary sheep Ammotragus lervia (Bovidae: Caprini) in the fenced Amassine reserve, Western High Atlas range, Morocco
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0011

item.title: Rediscovery of a population of the plains spotted skunk, Spilogale interrupta, a species of conservation concern, from southern Texas, USA
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0092

item.title: Ecology, distribution and habitat suitability analysis of the North African sengi (Petrosaltator rozeti, Macroscelidea, Afrotheria) in Tunisia
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2023-0096

item.title: New data on the poorly known Andean rodent Abrocoma uspallata (Rodentia: Abrocomidae)
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0086

item.title: Complex reproductive and migratory patterns in the European free-tailed bat (Tadarida teniotis) (Molossidae)
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2023-0166

item.title: Roosting ecology, reproduction, and population fluctuations of three Hipposideros species (Chiroptera) in Indonesian caves
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2023-0050

item.title: Exploring mammalian diversity in a human-modified landscape: insights from a small Cerrado fragment surrounded by silviculture
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0050

item.title: Cytogenetic data from remote areas of Amazon: new karyotypes for spiny rats (Rodentia: Echimyidae)
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0010

item.title: Pigmentation anomalies and lesions in bats from Oaxaca, Mexico
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0015

item.title: Camera trapping reveals the reddish phenotype of jaguarundi (Herpailurus yagouaroundi) on the western border of Brazilian Pantanal
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2023-0158

item.title: First record of a white phenotype Egyptian weasel (Mustela subpalmata) in Tahta, Sohag, Egypt
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0099

item.title: First record of the spotted hyena Crocuta crocuta in Egypt during the past 5,000 years
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0031

item.title: First records and extension of the geographic distribution of Cynomops kuizha (Chiroptera: Molossidae) in the Colombian Caribbean
item.description: Article by Yoseth David Blanquiceth Tamara, Sebastián Cuadrado-Rios, Juan Pretelt, Juan Urzola, María Ozuna Ortega, Julio Chacón-Pacheco, Hugo Mantilla-Meluk DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0097
